p2p_enrich.notes: Added 2 repo_tests p2p gates: (1) test_repo_typecheck - uses Bun transpiler to verify TypeScript syntax of modified files (thread.ts, worker.ts), (2) test_repo_unit_tests_relevant - runs bun install then bun test on util tests (timeout, iife, lazy) that cover code related to the modified files. CI commands found and tested: bun typecheck (requires bun install + tsgo, passes), bun test (requires bun install for workspace deps, passes for util tests). The Bun transpiler provides lightweight syntax validation; util tests verify key functionality (withTimeout, iife) used in the modified code.

validate.notes: All validation checks passed. Fixed 2 rubric rules that were failing the gold solution: removed 'Prefer if-return over else statements' and 'Inline single-use variables' rules which were duplicates of fail-to-pass test checks. Remaining 3 rubric rules pass with ICR=1.00.
